title: GHZ state in Qiskit
prompt: Write a Qiskit circuit that prepares a 3-qubit GHZ state and measures all qubits.
expected_features: CX from qubit 0 to 1 and qubit 1 to 2
notes: qcheck v0 scores the static verdict only. 'expected_features' is task intent for future semantic grading; not auto-verified in v0.
